examples: Say so, the lion, should have leonine vivid law and look.
Beside the front door was a plaque with Marx's leonine head in profile.
No one else seemed to know quite what to say, and then Jasper was there -tall and leonine.
It seems more characteristically leonine to leap at the weak and slow prey.
Somalia's leonine president, Abdullahi Yusuf, may be undermining Mr Adde's efforts by refusing to compromise with even milder Islamists.
